title: When is Trump's birthday? What to know about the president's big day
shortDescription: With Trump’s 80th birthday looming, preparations for UFC Freedom 250 are in full swing. Here's what to know ahead of the president's big day.

title: Crypto fraudster Sam Bankman-Fried asks for Trump pardon
shortDescription: Sam Bankman-Fried, the former crypto mogul convicted of stealing $8 billion from his customers, has asked President Trump for a pardon.

title: Trump adds UFC bout to presidents’ sports traditions
shortDescription: President Donald Trump will be hosting the White House’s first UFC fight on June 14, 2026. Look back at past sports events held at the White House.

title: Security ramps up for Trump at Knicks Finals
shortDescription: New York boosts security at Madison Square Garden as President Donald Trump plans to attend the Knicks NBA Finals game.

title: Trump's $100,000 fee on new H-1B visas struck down by judge
shortDescription: A federal judge blocked a Trump administration policy adding a $100,000 dollar fee to new H-1B visas for skilled workers.

title: After campaigning against starting wars, Trump denies making pledge
shortDescription: In the 2024 campaign, Donald Trump said he's "not going to start a war." But amid the war in Iran, Trump is now denying he made the pledge.

title: Could the UFC Freedom 250 White House event be canceled after lawsuit?
shortDescription: Lawsuit challenges UFC 250 White House stadium and use of public grounds; Trump admin calls it baseless as crews prep.

title: Watch Trump news and schedule tonight from the Trump Connect reporter

title: The Trump-Epstein Memorial Reading Room is coming to DC. What is it?
shortDescription: The temporary art and political installation had been in New York, and it's now set to come to Washington DC's Chinatown neighborhood.

title: Trump scraps Freedom 250 concerts & makes himself headliner
shortDescription: After several artists quit the Freedom 250 concert series over organizers’ ties to Donald Trump, the US president has announced a replacement event featuring himself as the headliner.

title: Trump walks out of 'Meet the Press' interview
shortDescription: President Donald Trump abruptly walked out an interview with NBC's "Meet the Press" after Kristen Welker challenged unsubstantiated election claims.
